name: Ikea Family Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IKEA Family Credit Card terms

additionalBenefits: Unlimited 3% cashback on IKEA spends as listed on Axis Bank catalogue

Dining Delights offers may apply as per Axis Bank programme terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
